campaign.name: TradeTap — Accountant white-label (Touch 1→3)
campaign.liaNote: Legitimate interest: B2B offer to UK accountancy practices re trade-client missed-call recovery; minimal work contact data; immediate opt-out.

variants.label: A
variants.subject: your plumber clients are losing jobs while they're on site
variants.body:
Hi {{firstName|there}},

Quick question: do any of your trade clients complain they're "too busy on jobs to answer the phone" — then wonder why leads dry up?

We built TradeTap for exactly that. When a customer calls and nobody picks up:

1. Captures the missed call (via their existing business number)
2. Sends an intelligent SMS within 60 seconds — triaged by urgency
3. Includes their booking link so the caller can self-serve
4. Tracks recovered jobs and attributed revenue in a weekly report

White-label partner programme: £99/mo retail, £50/mo to you. 20 clients = £1,000/mo recurring.

15-minute demo? Reply "demo" and I'll send a Cal link.

Will

variants.label: B
variants.subject: £50/mo per client — white-label missed-call recovery
variants.body:
Hi {{firstName|there}},

If {{company}} has trade clients (plumbers, electricians, builders), they're probably missing 30–50 calls a month while on site.

TradeTap recovers those automatically — SMS within 60 seconds, booking link included, weekly revenue report.

Partner programme: you bill £99/mo, keep £50/mo, we stay invisible.

Worth a 15-min demo? Reply "demo".

Will

variants.label: C
variants.subject: 47 missed calls last month. how many became jobs?
variants.body:
Hi {{firstName|there}},

Clients don't buy "AI SMS triage". They buy: "You missed 47 calls last month. We recovered 12 jobs worth £1,840."

That's the weekly report TradeTap sends your trade clients. White-label available for practices like {{company}} — £50/mo margin per client.

Live demo: https://red-tape-engine.onrender.com (click Simulate Call).

Reply "demo" if useful.

Will

variants.label: A
variants.body:
Hi {{firstName|there}},

Following up on TradeTap — one thing accountants tell us resonates with trade clients:

"You missed 47 calls last month. We recovered 12 jobs worth £1,840."

That line comes straight from the weekly report. Clients don't buy software — they buy recovered revenue on paper.

Still happy to do a 15-min demo. Reply "demo" or "not now".

Will

variants.label: A
variants.body:
Hi {{firstName|there}},

Last note on the TradeTap partner programme — if missed-call recovery isn't a fit for your client base right now, no worries.

If you have even one plumber or electrician who mentions losing leads, the offer stands: £99/mo retail, £50/mo to you, fully white-label.

Door's open — just reply.

Will

prospecting.note: Accountancy activities. For direct trades outreach use 43220 (plumbing), 43210 (electrical).
prospecting.icpFilter: Reject law firms, recruiters, mortgage brokers. Keep UK accountancy practices.

importInstructions: 1. POST brand profile: POST /api/brand-profiles with reach-tradetap-brand-profile.json body
2. POST campaign: POST /api/campaigns with campaign object + brandProfileId from step 1
3. PUT steps: PUT /api/campaigns/:id/steps with { steps: [...] } from this file
4. Prospecting: Reach UI → Prospecting → SIC 69201 + UK → import → enrol in campaign
6. Dry-run in SEND_MODE=sandbox first, then live when warmup allows
